source_file: 4-5.FL.2 Lesson - How Can SMART Goals Help You Achieve Your Dreams_.docx
output_file: 4-5.FL.2 Lesson - How Can SMART Goals Help You Achieve Your Dreams_.md

analysis.summary: This is a comprehensive lesson plan for grades 4-5 that teaches students the SMART goals framework (Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound) to help them achieve personal and financial dreams. The lesson includes video content, hands-on activities, progress tracking tools, and family engagement strategies to build goal-setting skills.

entities.name: Lesson 2: How Can SMART Goals Help You Achieve Your Dreams?
entities.description: A 45-minute financial literacy lesson for grades 4-5 focusing on SMART goals
